name: Lucas Torres Santana
title: Head of Staking at Hashdex
tagline: Theoretical physicist turned crypto infrastructure builder. Bridging rigorous science and decentralized finance.
about: Bridges the gap between complex theoretical frameworks and actionable digital asset strategies, backed by over four years of deep industry experience in crypto research and asset management, complemented by two years of specialized research and modeling within the oil and gas industry. A rigorous scientific thinker holding both a BSc and a PhD in Theoretical Physics from the Federal University of Rio de Janeiro, applying a first-principles approach to problem-solving and extracting meaningful insights from complex data across diverse fields, including digital assets, cosmology, and geosciences. Thrives at the intersection of technical depth and clear communication, delivering high-stakes inputs for executive leadership and global clients, making the complex accessible.
